sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69772" key="nasth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ναστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ναίω</etym>) <sense id="n69772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inhabitant</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
